name: Example: W.P. Paired Weapons (special rules pattern)
description: Illustrates ancient W.P. without a numeric tier ladder: pairedWeapons block plus specialManeuvers for machine-discoverable tactics.

pairedWeapons.summary: Paired weapon fighting style; see specialManeuvers for tactical options.

specialManeuvers.name: Simultaneous Strike and Parry
specialManeuvers.description: Strike and parry in one melee action; requires available attacks.

specialManeuvers.name: Twin Strike
specialManeuvers.description: Two weapons vs one target; one strike roll, one melee action.
